arts.ttl: ‘Interest is confirmed’ – Chelsea ‘stepping up’ efforts to secure deadline day signing, negotiations ongoing
arts.sum: Chelsea are eyeing a late move for AS Saint-Étienne’s Mathis Amougou before the winter market closes later today. That’s at least what L’Equipe are reporting, and they state Blues are keen on securing the 19-year-old’s services. Their title the west London club ‘persist’ in their pursuit of Mathis Amougou. arts.sum: Blues form has dropped as transfer speculation has ramped up and Maresca admits ‘feeling of relief’

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Joao Felix 'likely' to leave Stamford Bridge - Ornstein
arts.sum: Joao Felix is “likely” to leave Chelsea on loan before the end of Transfer Deadline Day, although Christopher Nkunku is now expected to remain at Stamford Bridge. Chelsea are eager to send Felix out on loan in order to ensure he plays regular first-team football for the rest of the campaign and an exit before the conclusion of Deadline Day has been described as “likely” by The Athletic’s David Ornstein .

arts.ttl: Enzo Fernandez drops early Chelsea team news hint as Enzo Maresca explains Robert Sanchez decision
arts.sum: Enzo Fernandez and Noni Madueke have dropped early team news hints ahead of Chelsea's clash against West Ham. The Blues will host the Hammers at Stamford Bridge on Monday evening as they both look to climb the Premier League table . Nevertheless, Fernandez and Madueke have posted pre-match graphic previews of the West Ham fixture to their respective Instagram stories.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Aston Villa ready to pay £50m for defender?
arts.sum: Aston Villa are allegedly prepared to pay £50m in order to secure a deal for a Chelsea defender before close of business on Monday.
